query: Create a new ESCloud cluster for development in cn-beijing. I don't know what VPC/subnet/specs/versions are available. Walk me through it and only run the create once I confirm the final plan.
expected_behavior: Uses the control plane workflow (CONTROL_PLANE.md) and runs discovery commands before proposing create inputs.
Runs: control.py versions (preferred), control.py vpc, control.py subnet --vpc-id <id>, control.py node_specs (and optionally zones) to gather valid options.
Presents a short set of recommended options (not an exhaustive dump) and asks the user to choose VPC/subnet/version/specs/password.
Does not run control.py create until the user explicitly confirms the final chosen parameters.
After create, runs control.py detail --id <id> and then offers ip_allowlist_set guidance if data endpoint is unreachable.
